```python
import sys

def shortest_palindrome(s):
    n = len(s)
    lps = [0] * n
    for i in range(1, n):
        j = lps[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and s[i] != s[j]:
            j = lps[j - 1]
        if s[i] == s[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    longest_prefix = lps[-1]
    return s + s[:longest_prefix:-1]

def solve():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    print(shortest_palindrome(input))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
```
